name: io.github.mshegolev/jaeger-mcp
description: Jaeger MCP — search traces, inspect spans, map service dependencies (read-only).

environmentVariables.name: JAEGER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Jaeger query service URL, e.g. https://jaeger.example.com

environmentVariables.name: JAEGER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for authentication. Takes priority over Basic auth.

environmentVariables.name: JAEGER_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: HTTP Basic auth username. Used only when JAEGER_TOKEN is not set.

environmentVariables.name: JAEGER_SSL_VERIFY
environmentVariables.description: Verify SSL certificates (true/false). Set to 'false' for self-signed certs.
